title: IMMIGRATION LEGAL SERVICES - 211info
text: IMMIGRANT CONNECTION PDX IMMIGRATION LEGAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal assistance with issues relating to immigration such as family and marriage-based petitions, naturalization petitions, legal permanent resident and employment authorization renewals, adjustment of status, Consular processing, the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program, Temporary Protected Status (TPS), non-immigrant visas, religious worker visas, and other related immigration services. 16700 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Email (971) 202-2073 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 202-2073 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information and to schedule an appointment. Appointments are available in-person or virtually. Call if no internet capability. FEES: -In-person appointment: $40 for initial consultation -Virtual appointment: $80 for initial consultation Consultation fees do not include any legal or filing fees that may be required DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish Website: Online document PDFs available in English, Spanish, French, Korean, Portuguese, Russian, Tagalog AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet route 77, NE Halsey and 168th Place stop Services: Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IMMIGRANT CONNECTION PDX
